meta.title: ProjentIQ — AI invoice and document automation for businesses
meta.description: AI automation for invoice and document processing, built for Slovak and Czech businesses.

hero.title: Photograph an invoice and the system reads it straight into your books.
hero.lead: It picks out the amount, vendor, tax ID, and due date — you just check the result and approve it. Works with invoices from email, scans, or a phone photo.

rotator.item_1: Extracts amounts, tax IDs, and due dates from invoices.
rotator.item_2: Answers questions based on your internal documents.
rotator.item_3: Runs repeatable tasks based on rules you set.

how_it_works.title: How it works
how_it_works.step_1_desc: Send an invoice by email, scan it, or take a photo with your phone.
how_it_works.step_2_desc: It reads the amount, vendor, tax ID, and due date.
how_it_works.step_3_desc: Compare the result with the original and fix anything if needed.
how_it_works.step_4_title: It's recorded in your accounting system
how_it_works.step_4_desc: Once approved, the document is saved directly into your system.

products.title: Solutions & pricing
products.card_1_desc: Automatically reads and sorts invoices, delivery notes, and receipts into your accounting system.
products.card_1_for: For businesses processing dozens to hundreds of documents a month.
products.card_2_desc: Searches your internal documents and answers questions with a source reference.
products.card_2_for: For teams losing time searching through documentation.
products.card_3_desc: Runs repeatable tasks based on rules you define — no manual steps.
products.card_3_for: For businesses with repeatable processes across multiple systems.

why.title: Why ProjentIQ
why.item_1_desc: Processing happens in the EU — no data leaves the agreed infrastructure.
why.item_2_desc: We support Pohoda, Omega, and iDoklad — no manual export or import.
why.item_3_desc: Not a translation from English — the system is trained on local documents and language.
why.item_4_desc: Before you commit, we'll show you how the system handles your real invoices.

testimonials.coming_soon: We don't have publishable references yet — we're working on this with our first clients.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.a1: Data is processed within the EU and doesn't leave the agreed infrastructure. We sign a data processing agreement under GDPR with every client.
faq.q2: Which accounting systems do you connect to?
faq.a2: We currently support Pohoda, Omega, and iDoklad. For other systems we can build a custom connection — get in touch.
faq.a3: It depends on the scope and number of document types, usually days to a few weeks. You'll get an exact estimate after the first consultation.
faq.q4: What if the system misreads a document?
faq.a4: You flag the error right during review, correct the value, and the system remembers it for similar documents going forward.
faq.q5: Do we need to change our current accounting system?
faq.a5: No, the system connects to your existing setup — it doesn't replace it.

cta_band.title: We'll show you on your own invoice.
